{{Short description|None}}
{{One source|date=January 2024}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=January 2024}}
The locations, lands, and nations mentioned in the Bible are not all listed here. Some locations might appear twice, each time under a different name. Only places having their own [[Wikipedia]] articles are included. See also the [[list of minor biblical places]] for locations which do not have their own Wikipedia article.
{{Compact ToC|center=yes}}

==A==
* [[Tomb of Absalom|Absalom's Monument]]
* [[Achaea (ancient region)|Achaia]]
* [[Admah]]
* [[Ai (Canaan)|Ai]]
* [[Akko]]
* [[Akkad (city)|Akkad]] – [[Mesopotamian]] state
* [[Allammelech]] – within the [[Tribe of Asher]] land, described in the [[Book of Joshua]].<ref>{{cite web | title=Topical Bible: Alammelech | website=Bible Hub | url=https://biblehub.com/topical/a/alammelech.htm | access-date=18 January 2024}}</ref>
* [[Allon Bachuth]]
* [[Alqosh]], in the [[Nineveh Plains]], mentioned in the [[Book of Nahum]]
* [[Ammon]] – [[Canaan]]ite state
* [[Attalia]] – In [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Antioch]] – In [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Antipatris]]
* [[Arabia]] – (in biblical times and until the 7th century AD Arabia was confined to the [[Arabian Peninsula]])
* [[Aram (biblical region)|Aram]]/[[Aramea]] – (Modern [[Syria]])
* [[Erbil|Arbela]] (Erbil/Irbil) – [[Assyria]]n city
* [[Archevite]]
* [[Armenia]] – [[Proto-Indo-Europeans|Indo-European]] kingdom of eastern [[Asia Minor]] and southern [[Caucasus]].
* [[Arrapkha]] – [[Assyria]]n city, modern [[Kirkuk]]
* [[Ashdod (ancient city)|Ashdod]]
* [[Ascalon|Ashkelon]]
* Ashur/Asshur/[[Assur]] – capital city of [[Assyria]]
* [[Assyria]] – [[Mesopotamian]] Semitic state

==B==
* [[Baal-hazor]] – [[Canaan]]ite city
* [[Tower of Babel|Babel]]
* [[Babylon]]/[[Babylonia]] – [[Mesopotamian]] state
* [[Beer-Sheba]]
* [[Beirut]]
* [[Berea (Bible)|Berea]]
* [[Beth-Anath]]
* [[Bethany (Biblical village)|Bethany]]
* [[Bethel]]
* [[Bethharan]]
* [[Bethlehem]]
* [[Beth-rehob]]
* [[Bethsaida]]
* [[Beth Shemesh]] in Judah (distinct from those in Naphtali and Issachar)
* [[Beit She'an|Betshean]]
* [[Bochim]]
* [[Byblos]] – [[Phoenicia]]n state

==C==
* [[Cabul]]
* [[Calah]]/[[Kalhu]]/[[Nimrud]] – [[Assyria]]n city
* [[Calneh]] – [[Assyria]]n city
* [[Cana]] – Galilee
* [[Canaan]] – Region on the Eastern shore of the Mediterranean
* [[Capernaum]]
* [[Cappadocia]] – Region in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Carchemish]] – [[Assyria]]n city
* [[Caria]] – Nation in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Cenchrea]]
* [[Chaldea]] – [[Mesopotamian]] state, eventually encompassing Babylonia
* [[Chezib of Judah]]
* [[Chorazin]]
* [[Cilicia]] – Nation in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Crete]], [[Greece|Greek]] island
* [[Commagene]] – Nation in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Corduene]] – Nation in central [[Asia Minor]], homeland of the [[Kurds]]
* [[Ancient Corinth|Corinth]], City in [[Greece]]
* [[Kingdom of Kush|Cush]] – [[Africa]]n state
*[[Cyprus]]

==D==
*[[Damascus]]
*[[Dan (ancient city)|Dan (formerly Laish)]]

==E==
* [[Ebla]] – [[East Semitic]] state in northern Syria
* [[Edom]] –Ancient kingdom in [[Transjordan in the Bible|Transjordan]]
* [[Egypt]]
* [[Ekron]]
* [[Elam]] – ''Pre-Iranic'' Nation in [[Ancient Iran]]
* [[Elim (Bible)|Elim]]
* [[Emmaus]]
* [[En Gedi]]
* [[Ephesus|Ephesia]]/[[Ephesus]] – Greek city in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Eridu]] – [[Mesopotamian]] city
* [[Eritrea]]- [[Erythraean Sea]] Ancient name for [[Red Sea]] and surrounding region
* [[Eshcol]]
* [[Eshnunna]] – [[Mesopotamian]] city state
* [[Esthaol (Bible)|Esthaol]]
* [[Ethiopia]]

==G==
* [[Gabatha (disambiguation)]] - several, listed by Eusebius together with Gaba, Giv'a etc.
* [[Gabbatha]] or Lithostrotos
* [[Galilee]]
* [[Garden of Eden]]
* [[Gath (city)|Gath]]
* [[Gaul]] – modern [[France]]
* [[Gaza City|Gaza]]
* [[History of Georgia (country)|Georgia]]
* [[Gerar]]
* [[Gethsemane]]
* [[Gibeon (ancient city)|Gibeon]]
* [[Gilead]]
* [[Golgotha]]
* [[Sodom and Gomorrah|Gomorrah]]
* [[Land of Goshen|Goshen]]
* [[Mediterranean Sea|Great Sea]] – [[Mediterranean Sea]] in the Bible
* [[Ancient Greece|Greece]]
* [[Gutium]] – state in [[Iran]]

==H==
* [[Heaven]]
* [[Haran (biblical place)|Haran]]
* [[Harran]] – [[Assyria]]n City
* [[Hattusa]] – Capital of [[Hittite Empire]] in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Hattusa|Hatti]] – Nation in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Havilah]]
* Hazazon Tamar (also Hazazon-tamar or Hatzatzon-Tamar) – [[Ein Gedi (archaeological site)|Ein Gedi]]
* [[Hebron]]
* [[Helam]]
* [[Hell]]
* [[Mount Gaash|Hill of Gash]]
* [[Hurri]] Nation – Nation in [[Asia Minor]]

==I==
* [[Israel]]
*[[Imgur-Enlil]] – [[Assyria]]n City
* [[India]] – Esther 1:1
==J==
* [[Jabbok]]
* [[Jaffa]]
* [[Jarmuth]] (Yarmut)
* [[Jeshanah]] 
* [[Jerash]] (Gerasa)
* [[Jericho]]
* [[Jerusalem]]
* [[Jordan River]]
* [[Kingdom of Judah|Judah]]
* [[Judea]]
* [[Jubilee]]

==K==
* [[Kabzeel]]
* [[Kadesh-Barnea]]
* [[Kaskians|Kaska]] – Nation in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Kassite]] state – in Iran
* [[Keilah]]
* [[Kiriath-Jearim]] – City in Gibeon
* [[Kish (Sumer)|Kish]] – [[Mesopotamian]] City State
* [[Kingdom of Kush|Kush]]/[[Cush (Bible)|Cush]] – in northeast Africa

==L==
* [[Lachish]]
* [[Dan (biblical city)|Laish]]
* [[Laodicea on the Lycus|Laodicea]]
* [[Larsa]] – [[Mesopotamian]] city
* [[Lebanon]]
* [[Lehi (Bible)|Lehi]]
* [[Lycia]] – Nation in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Lydia]] – Nation in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Lystra]]

==M==
* [[Machpela]]
* [[Macedonia (ancient kingdom)|Macedonia]]
* [[Magan (civilization)|Magan]] – ''Pre-Arab'' state in Oman
* [[Malta]]
* [[Mamre Plain]]
* [[Mannea]] – Nation in [[Iran]]
* [[Marah (Bible)|Marah]]
* [[Mari, Syria|Mari]] – Assyrian city
* [[Mareshah]]
* [[Median Empire|Media]] – Nation in Iran
* [[Tel Megiddo|Megiddo]]
* [[Meluhha]] – ''Pre-Arab'' state in the Arabian Peninsula
* [[Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]
* [[Mesopotamia]] – Includes the kingdoms of [[Sumer]], [[Akkadian Empire|Akkad]], [[Assyria]], [[Babylonia]], [[Chaldea]], and the neo Assyrian states of [[Adiabene]], [[Osroene]] and [[Hatra]].
* [[Midian]]
* [[Moab]] – Cannanite state
* [[Mount Carmel]]
* [[Mount Ephraim]]
* [[Mount Hermon]]
* [[Mount Nebo (Jordan)|Mount Nebo]]
* [[Mount of Olives]]
* [[Mount Sinai]]
* [[Mount Tabor]]
* [[Battle of Mount Zemaraim|Mount Zemaraim]]
* [[Mount Zion]]
* [[Mysia]] – state in Asia Minor

==N==
* [[Naarath]]
* [[Aram-Naharaim|Nahor]]
* [[Nahrain]] ([[Mesopotamia]])
* [[Nazareth]]
* [[Nimrud]] – later name for the Assyrian city of [[Kalhu]]/[[Calah]]
* [[Nineveh]] – Capital of [[Assyria]]
*[[Nile]] – river in northeastern [[Africa]]
* [[Land of Nod|Nod]]

==O==
* [[Ono, Benjamin|Ono]]
* [[Ophir]]
* [[Opis]] – [[Mesopotamian]]/[[Babylonia]]n City
* [[Osroene]] – [[Neo-Assyrian]] state

==P==
* [[Palmyra]] – [[Aramean]] state in Syria
* [[Desert of Paran|Paran]]
* [[Parthia]] – Nation in [[Iran]]
* [[Penuel]]
* [[Perga]] – Town In [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Persia]] – Nation in [[Iran]]
* [[Petra]]
* [[Philistia]] – Original name of Palestine
* [[Phrygia]] – Nation in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Phut]]
*[[Phoenicia]]
* [[Pithom]]
* [[Land of Punt|Punt]]
* [[Puqudu]], as "Pekod"
* [[Patmos]]

==R==
* [[Lehi (Bible)|Ramathlehi]]
* [[Rapiqum]] – Assyrian City
* [[Rehoboth (Bible)]]
* [[Rephidim]]
*[[Roman Empire]] – [[Rome]]

==S==
* [[Samaria]] – Nation of the [[Samaritans]]
* [[Sardis]]
* [[Scythia]] – Nation in [[Asia Minor]]
* [[Salem (Bible)|Shalem]]
* [[Sheba]] – ''Pre-Arab'' state in [[Yemen]]
* [[Shechem]]
* [[Sheol]]
* [[Shiloh (biblical city)|Shiloh]]
* [[Shinar]] – [[Mesopotamian]] city
* [[Shomron]]
* [[Shubat-Enlil]] – Assyrian city
* [[Shur (Bible)]], also Sur (wilderness of ~, way of ~)
* [[Sidon]]
* [[Wilderness of Sin|Sin Desert]]
* [[Sinai Peninsula|Sinai]]
* [[Smyrna]]
* [[Sodom and Gomorrah|Sodom]]
* [[Spain]] – Romans 15.24
* [[Sumer]]/[[Sumer]]ia – [[Mesopotamian]] state and region
* [[Syria]]/[[Aramea]]

==T==
* [[Tabal (state)|Tabal]] – [[Georgian people|Georgian]] state in Asia Minor
* [[Tarshish]]
* [[Tarsus, Mersin|Tarsus]]
* [[Tel Dan]]
* [[Teqoa (ancient town)|Teqoa]]
* [[Til Barsip|Til-barsip]] – Assyrian city
* [[Timnath-serah]]
* [[Timnath (Philistine city)|Timnath]]
* [[Trachonitis]]
* [[Tushhan]] – Assyrian city
* [[Tyre, Lebanon|Tyre]]

==U==
* [[Ugarit]] – [[Amorite]] state
* [[Umma]] – [[Mesopotamian]] state and city
* [[Ur of the Chaldees|Ur]] – [[Mesopotamian]] state and city
* [[Urartu]] – [[Hurrian]] state in the [[Caucasus]]
* [[Urkesh|Urkish]] – [[Mesopotamian]] state and city
* [[Uruk]] – [[Mesopotamian]] state and city
* [[The Land of Uz]]

==V==
* [[Via Dolorosa]]

==X==
* Xaloth – the biblical Chesulloth (now [[Iksal]])

==Y==
* Yarmut: see [[Jarmuth]]
* [[Yemen]]

==Z==
* [[Zanoah]]
* [[Zelah, Judea]]
* [[Zelzah (biblical place)|Zelzah]]
* [[Zemaraim]]
* [[Zeredathah]]
* [[Zoara]]
* [[Zorah]]
* [[Zion]]
* [[Zobah]]

==See also==
* [[List of biblical names]]
* [[List of Hebrew place names]]
* [[List of modern names for biblical place names]]
* [[List of nations mentioned in the Bible]]
* [[Cities in the Book of Joshua]]

==References==
{{Reflist}}
<!-- I have updated this list at 21:54 on Monday 20th February up to 1 Samuel "Samuel Child of the Lord" -->

[[Category:Biblical places| ]]
[[Category:Bible-related lists|Places]]
